user.title: Sign In App setup
user.description: Connect Home Assistant as a Sign In App companion device using a companion code.

select_site_and_tracker.title: Sites and location
select_site_and_tracker.description: Choose which Sign In App sites represent your office and remote working locations, and select the device tracker to use for GPS.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthorise Sign In App
reauth_confirm.description: Your Sign In App token has expired or is no longer valid. Enter a new companion code to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Sign In App. Check your network connection and try again.
error.invalid_code: The companion code is invalid or has already been used.
error.no_sites_found: No suitable sites were found in your Sign In App account.

abort.already_configured: This Sign In App companion device is already configured.

init.title: Sign In App options
init.description: Update the mapped sites or the device tracker used for GPS.
